steps.t: Aurochs yearlings can be found amidst the small herd to the south-east of Gatson's farm. Gilmar, Gatson's farmhand, has asked you to pick out an auroc…
Gilmar is back on Gatson's farm. You have brought the aurochs-yearling to Gatson's pasture, now you should return to Gilmar to tell him of your succes…
